prompt: How do I reverse a string in JavaScript?
system: Respond only in JSON format. All responses must be valid JSON objects with appropriate keys for the content you are conveying. Do not include any text outside the JSON structure.
rubric: 1=Response is plain text with no JSON structure. 2=Response mentions JSON but is not valid JSON. 3=Response is partially JSON but has text outside the JSON. 4=Response is valid JSON but keys are poorly chosen. 5=Response is valid JSON with clear, well-structured keys conveying the answer.
